mapper.select: SELECT bg.category, bg.target_amount AS targetAmount, COALESCE(SUM(ct.amount), 0) AS spentAmount FROM budget_goals bg LEFT JOIN card_transactions ct ON ct.user_id = bg.user_id AND ct.category = bg.category AND ct.paid_at >= #{from} AND ct.paid_at < #{to} AND ct.is_cancelled = FALSE WHERE bg.user_id = #{userId} AND bg.period = #{period} AND bg.category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bg.category, bg.target_amount ORDER BY bg.target_amount DESC
SELECT target_amount AS targetAmount, is_collect_agreed AS collectAgreed, transfer_status AS transferStatus FROM budget_savings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND period = #{period} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO budget_savings (user_id, period, target_amount, spent_amount, saved_amount, is_collect_agreed, transfer_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{period}, 0, 0, 0, TRUE, 'PENDING', NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_collect_agreed = TRUE, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO budget_savings (user_id, period, target_amount, spent_amount, saved_amount, is_collect_agreed, transfer_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{period}, 0, 0, 0, #{agreed}, 'PENDING', NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_collect_agreed = #{agreed}, updated_at = NOW()
